title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.964 - Retirement with normal annuity
text:
57.964.  Retirement with normal annuity. — 1.  Any member who has attained the age of fifty-five years and who has twelve years or more of creditable service as sheriff of a county may retire with a normal annuity.
  2.  Any member who has attained the age of sixty-two years and who has at least eight years of creditable service as sheriff of a county may retire with a normal annuity.
(L. 1983 H.B. 81 § 57.920)
